scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @areti/api" "npm run dev --workspace @areti/web"
scripts.dev:stop: bash -lc 'for p in 3000 3001 3002 4000; do pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -15 $pids; fi; done; sleep 1; for p in 3000 3001 3002 4000; do pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -9 $pids; fi; done; docker compose down >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @areti/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @areti/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @areti/db
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @areti/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @areti/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @areti/db
scripts.test: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run build
